reviews.review_description:
It feels like hitting air most of the time with the weak rumble and the notes are kind of hard to see sometimes. 
Feels like we could have a bit more options like to increas or decrease graphics whenever we get better graphics. other than that pretty fun and a massive variety of songs to choose from way more than beat saber on here. I genuinely want to enjoy this game more though but still a long way to go

developer_response.body: Thanks for the feedback. I'm working on improved graphics, stay tuned!

reviews.review_title: A NEW ERA for VR RHYTHM GAMES ⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐
reviews.review_description: I never thought I'd find an app that would cause me to take a break from my daily Pistol Whip & Synthriders regimen. Groovy Labs finally did it. Gameplay, choreography, & mapping are all TOP-TIER, in league with the top dogs in the genre. It's like the best of Beat Saber, Smash Drums & SR all-in-one! It's all in the modifications + If you like BS, you choose objects with arrows, if you like SR, you choose an orb as your weapon & snowballs as your object. If you like SD, grab yourself some sticks! Depending on which weapon you choose, the objects can come at you from just inside your field of view or take a more narrow path. Either way you get one heck of a shoulder workout - with the wider path causing quite the shoulder burn! I've only played a fraction of the 130,000+ songs available, but every time I do, I'm blown away by the results. Always capturing the vibes of the songs (using the BeatSaver database) - using the beat, lyrics & cadence to create wonderful blood-pumping masterpieces! Marek Stój has achieved a rare kind of digital alchemy. By building a bridge to the vast BS library, he’s ensured that his work will live on Immortal - in the Body, Mind, & Spirit of every player who finds their flow & joy in his inspired sandbox :) Only $10 with unlimited music & fantastic gameplay? I'd say it's the best value in the App Store!

developer_response.body: Thank you for such an elaborate and kind review!

reviews.review_description: Some levels are a bit ridiculous with difficulty spikes but it is nice to have a lot of songs that beat saber doesn't

developer_response.body: Thanks!

reviews.review_description: Groovy Labs is an absolute blast. The gameplay is smooth, energetic, and just plain fun, but what really sets it apart is the developer support. I requested a few songs and was shocked when they were added the very next day. It’s clear the devs truly care about their players. If you’re on Meta Quest and love music-based games, this one is a must-have.
it's not that good and where are all the community songs there was before ?tho at any cost,don’t get the pcvr version. it’s not free and definitely not worth paying for.

developer_response.body: Right, more than 100'000 songs is not that many...

reviews.review_description: Hey BMG (body mind games) almost forgot to do this until now but such a good game its so amazing even that I like to play it I won't ever refund this or delete it its so addicting even with such a good community that I'm very glad to be apart of keep it up glad I can be on this masterpiece!!!!

developer_response.body: Thank you!

reviews.review_description: I don’t know if it’s normal but in the Meta Quest 3 the menus look with low graphic quality and poor clarity. You can see pixels and you can see all the bonds with saw teeth. I imagine it’s to save battery but at least the user should be given the option to increase the resolution or graphic quality without having to go to third-party tools

developer_response.body: Thanks for the review. I'll try improving the visuals.

reviews.review_description: I got bored of Beat Saber and Synthriders. Happy I found this game. Love the music and environments.
Love this app! Has lots of my favourite songs that I wasn’t expecting would be on here! So fun to play and feels like a workout so that’s a plus!

reviews.review_title: Most active, engaging game out there
reviews.review_description: I absolutely love this game. I've been playing for about a year now and still don't get bored with it. The evolving music selection is amazing and there are music styles to fit everyone. From someone that primarily listens to punk and metal, you really can't find a game with better music on it. And I enjoy the other genres as well. Different difficulty levels to suit anyone. And also has passthrough mode so you can observe your surroundings still. 10/10 recommend.

reviews.review_title: A must have for rhythm game lovers
reviews.review_description: Amazing playlists- so much music to choose from. Lots of options for weapons, notes, walls, environments and levels. The maps are well done.  I am so glad I got it. It plays well - and lots of variations in difficulty for each song. I love how the maps change with different block types. I love how the lyrics are displayed in many of the songs too.

I am enjoying this game.  The music is great, I can sing along with the lyrics and exercise whilst playing the games.  A good, varied choice of music.  I am still finding my way around all the different options.

I tried the game today and I really like it! I’m used to playing Beat Saber. The arrows are harder to hit than the blocks on Beat Saber but I suppose that will come with time.   The music selection is much better. More Lindsay Sterling would be amazing if I may put in a request- please include Roundtable Revival. :)  Thank you for making the game. I look forward to playing this!

developer_response.body: Thank you! I've added a few more songs by Lindsey, enjoy!

reviews.review_description: this game was created and is currently being developed by one single man and he's crushing it! although it may not be the same as it was once before, it's still a beautifully developed game. and if you think the game is trash now, don't br that way, if you wish a song you like was in the game, all you gotta do is go to discord.gg/mindbodygames, then go to the #songs channel and type your song and then wait for a response. this game will rise back up and you need to be here for it.

developer_response.body: Thank you! Just small correction, the Discord is: http://dsc.gg/bodymindgames :)

reviews.review_description:
I'm use to playing though the browser and I like the walls. In groovy labs it shows a tab for walls but I never see any walls. I have tried all of them, I could be doing something wrong. I would much rather play in the app.
I love the game, just would like walls, then it would be 5 stars
Dawn 
￼

developer_response.body: Thanks, I'm happy to report that the latest update (v3.13) brings the obstacles (walls) back!

reviews.review_title: Back to a must have game n lovin' it
reviews.review_description:
Admittedly it's been a rollercoaster of my review opinion but back to being able to say that this is still a permanent app in my house on all headsets, unfortunately not all the songs are back but the library of options is growing again with a hopeful return of the full song library and the developer is happy for request on there discord so I know Il be making alot of request

Don't skip this game as it's awesome and alot of fun, started as a physio aid to get some more movement after being crippled for almost a decade and this app has been my saving grace in helping my physical recovery

Love the game. Gameplay is awesome and very addictive. Would give five stars but some of the song titles don't have multiple difficultie modes so you can be stuck with expert when just starting out. Also I dont do discord so if you'd like to add any Pearl Jam Nirvana and Citezen Soldier I would be eternally grateful and a definite 5 stars 🌟
The game is a really fun beat sabers game with great music and fun environments. A great game to jump in to and injoy.

reviews.review_title: My favorite game and they listen!
reviews.review_description: It literally has everything you could ask for in a rhythm game. I love the selection of songs. Especially the kpop. Also they listen to suggestions. I suggested an artist on their discord server and they actually added them quickly. Really all around great game and team behind it!

Went into the game for the first time in several months and what an improvement!!! 👍🥇
Love the Christmas playlist and the end of game stats! Well done!!! 
I'm back!!! 😊

developer_response.body: Thanks!

reviews.review_description: This game Is the best.  it's free. You can request songs and you can customize your sword and background and you can also change the difficulties in beat saber you can't in this one you can so you wont be stuck in the same difficulty so I think that makes the game way better than beat sabor

reviews.review_title: Very bad game and it may or may not work
reviews.review_description:
I bought my meta quest 3 on the 19th of July 2024 this was one of the first free games I've tried it worked very good at first there were multiple games you could choose from 

Then a few weeks ago I tried the game and when I tried to play any song I would get an error message saying something went wrong please try again later it would happen with any song i tried to play 

Then what they've done now is you can't search for songs anymore which sucks

I wouldn't recommend this game as of 2025

The creator has 3 bundle packs you can buy to quote on quote support the creator but what's the point if the game doesn't work as intended 

I tried it 1 last time today on the 21st of August 2025 and it still doesn't work as intended

developer_response.body: I'm trying to bring back all previous songs. Stay tuned!

reviews.review_description: Fun andengaging
this game is like modded Beatsaber but more fun

It was alright for a bit, but then I did the mod for Beat Saber and never looked back. This is good if you don't wanna mod Beat Saber, but also very slow compared to even Open Saber. I mean not to drop a deuce on this guy's game, but it was way better and more fluid before he had to make the changes to it. Just an honest opinion and that's what a review is for to let people know what they're getting into. If you like slow games definitely go for it, but trust me, mod your Beat Saber.

I joined the game after a couple of months and not only I lost ALL the songs I added to favorites but also I can't find those songs anywhere... I was addicted to this game but now it's just a random game with few random songs...

Update: I know you're a single dev but don't worry, this review could turn back to 5 stars again in the future 😁

developer_response.body: The issues were all addressed.

reviews.review_description: Has a variety of songs to choose from, different backgrounds, different sabers and is fun to play. If they don't have a song you want you can request a song in the discord.

This app is so much fun.
Awesome workout, you will really work up a sweat 😓for sure. 
Love how you can change music, backgrounds, etc. 
If you are looking for a fun way to workout we're you can can customize to your liking. Look no further, this is a must have especially since it is free.
game used to be stellar, songs upon songs, now everything costs money. Honestly just buy a different game now. disappointing.

developer_response.body: I'm adding songs regularly, there's now hundreds of them. And only a handful of them are paid.

reviews.review_description: THIS GAME IS SO AWESOME AND IT'S A GREAT GAME AND SO WORTH IT

I also loved this & purchased from the free game to now unable to search for any songs that I used before as the ones I used to play are gone..... I'm directed to click on some link to join and still unable to get the songs I like ie Bruno Mars Cardi B etc :(

developer_response.body: I'm trying to bring back all previous songs. Stay tuned!

reviews.review_description: really good for a free game, I like the music.
nice one

developer_response.body: Wth??

reviews.review_description: Such a good workout from a game continuing to grow!  I enjoy this game
One of the best free games you can still enjoy your time and work out in the same time

developer_response.body: Thank you!

reviews.review_description: It's kinda like beat saber and i really like it
Great game, really fun to play

developer_response.body: Thanks!

reviews.review_description: I have spent hours in this game. Definitely try it out.
I cant search up songs and all my fav songs are gone. Wtf groovy labs

developer_response.body: Hi, I'm a single guy working on this game, it's still in early access. I was forced to limit the number of songs due to legal complaints from Meta :( But I'll be adding more successively. I'll also be implementing persistent favaorites soon. I hope you can consider leaving a better rating, so that I can keep going and improving the game. Thanks!

reviews.review_description: This used to have songs

developer_response.body: I'm trying to bring back all previous songs. Stay tuned!

reviews.review_description: I like how you made a definitely not “just a free beatsaber” and how the song library is huge. I have experienced an issue where the song plays but the blocks don’t spawn , I can feel the vibration and hear them being hit and the timer doesn’t start. Please fix this

100/100 I love how nicely made the game first impression! And most of all  I always dreamed of a good Open source community driven   game and for that it gets 5 stars! And thanks to community for all the songs!! Which is by far the most intuitive songs you’d love and know up and ready via just using the search tool. This game is really of the future
 (looking foward to: multiplayer would make the game truly feel alive and add the aspect of a server community no need to rush in to it yet but a important suggestion for a awesome game like this one   ;). 

Devs If you see this I hope it continues to be driven by the community and thank you for making it available to everyone with the songs and maps the people enjoy and had made.

This is the best thing I’ve downloaded hands down its one of the only reasons ive been using my headset but why cant i find it anywhere else? Im trying to download it on a different device but it doesn’t show in store or on the app?

Is it as flashy, smooth or futuristic looking as Beatsavers? Nope. But it's so much more fun because it has songs I know and the songmaps are so creative! Idk I still go back to beatsaver once in a while and enjoy it enough but I can play Groovy Labs for hours and not notice because it's so much fun! 
I donated way back because honestly I couldn't justify paying how much I did for Beatsaber when I have played labs many more hours even though I tried it later. Worth it!

developer_response.body: Thank you very much!

reviews.review_description: This WAS my absolute favorite game! I'd log on and this was pretty much the only game I'd play but now it's horrible you got stuff flying at you from different angles instead of the straight ahead and it just makes you wanna 🤢 makes me sad cause I don't wanna buy beat saber but this THIS whatever it is now is a big NO for me 👎👎👎

developer_response.body: Hey, I'd appreciate if you could check out the latest update. Directional swinging is back with arrows. If you like it, please update your rating. Thanks!!

reviews.review_description:
Why is this game changed? It was perfect before. I tried it today with new interface for cubes, and I couldn't finish one song. Before I was able to play for hours. Please revert back. Thanks

Edit: Its back to original glory. Thanks you. New power aero are even better than cubes. Wonderful updates. I am glad I kept the game. Back to fun exercise with largest song library.

developer_response.body: Thanks!

reviews.review_description: Everything about this game is perfect, at first i want beat saber but now i dont even want it now. But i just wish thy could add more music

developer_response.body: Thanks!

reviews.review_description: Please add the ability to delete downloaded songs

developer_response.body: Thanks for the feedback! I'll add this to my TODO list.

reviews.review_description: The game itself is good. A good free alternative to beat saber with a lot of music options but PLEASE. REMOVE THE DONATION SCHEME. Many people play this game due to the fact that it is a FREE game. While I understand the developer needs a source of income from the game, a donation scheme that pops up every time you finish a game won’t bring the effect the developer intended it to. For the sake of player’s enjoyment and experience and the game’s rating, please find a different way and I’ll change to a 5 star.

developer_response.body: Thanks for your feedback. I've reduced the frequency of the donation pop-up.

reviews.review_description: Don’t know why this game isn’t rated higher! Tons of free songs, fantastic gameplay, and options! Deadpool? Come on?! It doesn’t get any better. You’re missing out if you’re not playing this!!

developer_response.body: Thank you for the kind words! :D

reviews.review_description: Nockoff beat saber

developer_response.body: It's not just a knock off. There's a bigger vision behind it and the game is still in early access. You can read more about it here: https://www.beatlabs.dev/

reviews.review_description: They have most song artists and songs taht I want but I would like alex g too be added, overall great game!

developer_response.body: Thank you. Which songs are available is dependent on the community. You can always try requesting a song to be "mapped" and added. Google BeatSaver.

reviews.review_title: Such a fun game when bugs are fixed
reviews.review_description: So many problems to the point where my headset hast crashed and is stuck , so have to wait for it to die.  It's a shame because I was thoroughly enjoying getting the hang of it. Can't wait to see what it's like a couple of years down the track. I am definitely here for that! 😉🫡 I gave 3 stars because 1 the game is free,  2 its so much fun, and 3 there is so much to explore. The two stars taken away are for the glitching and that it has now frozen and can't use it. 😉🫡

developer_response.body: Hi! Sorry to hear you've been having issues with the game. Feel free to hop on on our Discord server and maybe we can work out a solution for you. Link is on the project's website: https://www.beatlabs.dev/

reviews.review_description:
I hate this game even beat saver Fan game can beat this 
￼￼

developer_response.body: Haters gonna hate.

reviews.review_description: I absolutely love it. Just got this headset and can’t really justify spending $30 on Beat Saber. Great job!

developer_response.body: Thank you!

reviews.review_title: Love it just like beat saber but better
reviews.review_description: It has more music variety and some songs that beat saber doesn't have (unless you mod beat saber which I can't do I have no clue how 😂) so this is a top bonus lots of great music to choose from, love how you can change the background etc, very fun!!!! Highly reccomend hopefully it's not to pricey once out of beta because I REALLY wanna keep playing

developer_response.body: Thanks!

reviews.review_title: Good free alternative to beat saber
reviews.review_description:
It has lots of songs, and even modded ones you can play just using the headset stand-alone and it's really fun, even having custom walls, environments, custom objects you can hit, and even custom weapons instead of just sabers.
But I think it could use more maps/environments and some songs I want that aren't on there, other than that it's a good and fun game and the developers seemed to have put a lot of work and effort into it.

developer_response.body: Thank you. More environments will definitely come.
